S.FORM: = Henri, Grand Duke of Luxembourg = Mntucing hngkawas 1955 idas 4 jiyax 16 ka Henri ga, empklaw ka hiya. Bukung klwaan Luxembourg ta sayang o kiya ka Henri, pnaah hngkawas 2000 idas 10 jiyax 7 pnrajing kmlawa klwaan.
S.PHON: = ħənɾi, gɾand dukə o* luxəmbouɾg = mntuʦiŋ ħŋkawas **** idas * ɟijax ** ka ħənɾi ga, əmpklaw ka ħija. bukuŋ klwaan luxəmbouɾg ta sajaŋ o kija ka ħənɾi, pnaaħ ħŋkawas **** idas ** ɟijax * pnɾaɟiŋ kmlawa klwaan.
S.FORM: = Henri, Grand Duke of Luxembourg = Mntucing hngkawas 1955 idas 4 jiyax 16 ka Henri ga, empklaw ka hiya. Bukung klwaan Luxembourg ta sayang o kiya ka Henri, pnaah hngkawas 2000 idas 10 jiyax 7 pnrajing kmlawa klwaan.
S.PHON: = ħənɾi, gɾand dukə o* luxəmbouɾg = mntuʦiŋ ħŋkawas **** idas * ɟijax ** ka ħənɾi ga, əmpklaw ka ħija. bukuŋ klwaan luxəmbouɾg ta sajaŋ o kija ka ħənɾi, pnaaħ ħŋkawas **** idas ** ɟijax * pnɾaɟiŋ kmlawa klwaan.
